evals.prompt: Report on repo health for acme/widgets.
evals.expected_output: Gathers traffic, contributor stats, community profile, and dependency-graph data, then presents a summary report.

deterministic_checks.description: Calls get_community_profile before presenting a summary

expectations: Calls the traffic, contributor-stats, community-profile, and dependency-graph tools
Presents a summary report without suggesting or making any repo change
Handles a computing: true contributor-stats result by saying to retry shortly, not reporting zero contributors
